description: This Java class implements a stub client for a credit bureau service used in local or development environments. It provides a deterministic credit score based on input identifiers without external service calls, mainly for testing or development purposes.

classes.name: StubCreditBureauClient
classes.description: A stub implementation of the CreditBureauClient interface, generating deterministic pseudo credit scores for testing environments.

methods.name: fetchReport
methods.description: Returns a simulated credit bureau report based on the request, generating a deterministic score or an error message if no identifiers are provided.

methods.name: deterministicScore
methods.description: Calculates a pseudo-random score within the 300-850 range based on a CRC32 hash of a provided key, ensuring reproducibility.
